# Desert Recovery Centers

## About
Desert Recovery Centers is a Joint Commission accredited luxury behavioral health organization with residential treatment facilities in Glendale, Arizona and Scottsdale, Arizona, and outpatient services (PHP, IOP, TMS) in Phoenix, Arizona. Founded by Jason Inserra, Thai Nguyen, and Dr. An Nguyen, DRC provides evidence-based addiction and mental health treatment including dual diagnosis care.

## Locations
- Glendale (male residential): 8105 W Frier Dr, Glendale, AZ 85303 | Phone: (623) 323-1012 | License: ADHS BH9449
- Scottsdale (female residential): 23222 N Church Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85255 | Phone: (480) 931-3617 | License: ADHS BH10131
- Phoenix (outpatient PHP/IOP/TMS): 1623 W Moody Trail, Phoenix, AZ 85041 | Phone: (623) 257-5384

## Accreditations & Certifications
- Joint Commission accredited (Gold Seal of Approval)
- LegitScript certified (both residential locations)
- ADHS licensed behavioral health provider
- Tricare/TriWest in-network
- Does NOT accept Medicaid or Medicare

## Leadership & Clinical Team
- Dr. An Nguyen — Clinical Director, Licensed Clinical Psychologist
- Dr. Reyes Topete MD — Medical Director
- Jason Inserra — Director of Operations
- Adam Leonard — Admissions Director
- Dr. Caitlin Ellis — Licensed Clinical Psychologist
- Dr. Jonathan Shelton — Licensed Clinical Psychologist
- Dr. Madison Day-Robinson — Licensed Clinical Psychologist
- Erica Tolley — Registered Nurse

## Services
Addiction Treatment: alcohol, heroin, fentanyl, cocaine, meth, marijuana, prescription drugs, stimulants, gambling, sex addiction
Mental Health Treatment: anxiety, depression, PTSD, bipolar disorder, OCD, ADHD, personality disorders, schizophrenia
Therapies: CBT, DBT, EMDR, trauma therapy, 12-step, SoftWave therapy, holistic therapies, dual diagnosis treatment
Levels of Care: residential treatment (10-bed max per facility), PHP, IOP, outpatient, NeuroStar TMS

## Contact
Website: https://desertrecoverycenters.com
Email: contact@desertrecoverycenters.com
General: (480) 931-3617

## Brand
Tagline: HEAL. RESTORE. THRIVE.
